name: Asparagus Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. For the stock: Snap off the lower ends of the asparagus and chop them into 1-inch pieces. Combine the rest of the stock ingredients in a stock pot, bring to a boil, simmer for 20-25 minutes, then strain.
2. For the soup: Cut off the tips of the asparagus and set aside. Chop the stems into 1-inch pieces. Melt butter in a soup pot, add leeks and cook over medium-high heat for 2-3 minutes. Add asparagus stems, salt, and parsley. Pour in 5 cups stock and bring to a boil. Simmer until asparagus is tender (about 6 minutes). Blend the soup, return to pot, stir in cream if using, and thin with more stock if necessary. Season with salt, pepper, and lemon peel.
3. Cook asparagus tips in a separate pot of boiling water with a little salt for 1-2 minutes until done. Add to the soup and bring to a gentle simmer.
